title: Process language: a simple recipe
subtitle: Describe how something is made.
duolingoBridge: Recipes are excellent A2 practice because they combine order, quantities, and commands.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use action verbs in sequence.
Knowledge point 2: add small quantities and time phrases.

items.fr: Ajoute un peu de sel et d’huile.
items.en: Add a little salt and oil.
items.es: Añade un poco de sal y aceite.

items.fr: Mélange les légumes dans un grand bol.
items.en: Mix the vegetables in a large bowl.
items.es: Mezcla las verduras en un bol grande.

items.fr: Fais cuire le riz pendant dix minutes.
items.en: Cook the rice for ten minutes.
items.es: Cocina el arroz durante diez minutos.

items.fr: À la fin, sers le plat avec du pain.
items.en: At the end, serve the dish with bread.
items.es: Al final, sirve el plato con pan.
